concierge: Restaurant referral and reservation: From entertaining your client to celebrating your childs birthday, i-Assist can suggest the perfect restaurant for every occasion. Flower and gift assistance: i-Assist will send gifts of your choice to your loved ones, even selecting the choicest flowers and presents to make your loved ones feel extra special. Hotel referral and reservation: Experience the luxury of attentive service even before your holiday begins. Simply call i-Assist to take care of all your arrangements at the finest hotels across India. Flight referral and reservation: Booking tickets the conventional way is a thing of the past. Call i-Assist for speedy flight reservations. Car rental and limousine service: i-Assist can make sure you travel in style with a chauffeur-driven car at your disposal. Booking and delivery of movie tickets: Don't want to stand in that queue? The i-Assist team can make sure movie tickets are bought and delivered at your doorstep. This service is currently available in New Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru and Chennai. Medical concierge privileges: In case of any unforseen situation should you need to be moved to a place where appropriate medical care is available, the i-Assist team can arrange for air and/or surface transportation and communication to move you to the required hospital. i-Assist can also put you in touch with physicians, hospitals, clinics, dentists and dental clinics on request. You can also ask to set up appointments with local doctors. Emergency auto assistance across India: A host of emergency auto assistance services including towing, repair and alternative travel assistance across New Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Bengaluru and Chennai are available for you.

REWARDS THATS TRULY REWARDING When it's time for you to redeem your ICICI Rewards points, we have ensured a worthy selection of rewards for you to choose from.
fuel: Nonw
travel: Private Islands A private island amply furnished with the bounties of nature and all the trappings of modern luxury. Its all you really need for the perfect holiday. Enjoy preferential rates on rentals at more than 50 hand-picked exotic islands spread across the Caribbean Isles, the Indian Ocean, off the coasts of New Zealand and Australia and in Europes famed Aegean and Mediterranean Seas. Private Yachts A luxury yacht, and nothing but family, friends and the ocean for company. Time away from the demands of dry land is just the thing you need to rejuvenate your senses. LUXURY ON THE HIGH SEAS - Be it a boardroom meeting or a private party, the Arabian Sea plays the perfect host. Enjoy the pleasures of the ocean in some of the worlds finest crafts with a complimentary yacht charter. Indulge in a complimentary yacht charter off the coast of Mumbai. Choose from two private yachts from Ocean Blue Boating Private Limited, Indias largest boating group: Lagoon 560 and Azimut 39. Food and Beverage services, customized menus and celebration arrangements are available on request. Lagoon 560 Whether you are vacationing with family or entertaining guests, this is one catamaran that is hard to beat. Exceptional in construction and design, the Lagoon 560 offers you all the conveniences of a modern cruising catamaran and is the perfect craft to entertain up to 25 people. This is only natural, given that the Lagoon is the largest luxury catamaran company in the world and the leader in manufacture of cruising catamarans. Azimut 39 Azimut Yachts, a leading brand in the world boating sector for decades.are the worlds first name in luxury motor yachts. Characterized by cutting edge design, unparalleled technological innovations and refined styling, the Azimut 39 is the perfect combination of visual harmony and practical function, capable of entertaining 10 people. "Private Jets Travel the world in the plush confines of a private jet available for you at special rates. Make your flight plan, arrive at your convenience, set your own schedule and sit back and enjoy the journey. Avail private jet charters with a world-class fleet at preferential rates from Club One Air, Indias largest operator of air charters. Choose from 400 destinations in India including all domestic airports, air force, naval and private airstrips. Also enjoy flight access to all international airports. Choose from a choice of three aircrafts: CRJ Execliner, Cessna Citation XL and the Cessna Citation CII. CRJ Execliner A top-of the line business jet, the CRJ Execliner is a 50-seater customized to seat 17 passengers with plush interiors, leather seats, sofas and a customized entertainment center. A jet that defines luxury in the air, the CRJ is well-equipped with satellite phones, DVD, LCD Screens and mood lighting. The most prominent aspect of the CRJ is the space it offers. The luxury seats rotate 180 degree, enabling guests to hold meetings and dine with one another, in luxurious surrounding. Cessna Citation XL The Cessna Citation XL is a light mid-size jet with many capabilities of large jets. The aircraft combines a luxurious comfortable cabin with excellent payload range performance. The jet can fly 8 passengers to their destination at speeds up to 800 km/hr. Cessna Citation CII The Cessna Citation CII jet accommodates 2+7 passengers while the powerful Pratt and Whitney Canada JTI5D4 engines and greater fuel tankage translate into higher cruise speeds and larger range.

Your Club ITC Culinaire membership1 includes the following privileges: GOURMET PRIVILEGES Earn Green Points2 @ 25% on all eligible Food & Beverage spends at participating ITC Hotels & WelcomHotels Enjoy savings of 20% while dining at participating Fortune and WelcomHeritage Hotels ACCOMMODATION PRIVILEGES Earn Green Points @ 5% on all eligible non Food & Beverage hotel spends at participating ITC Hotels, WelcomHotels and Fortune Hotels Enjoy personalised check-in and double occupancy benefits for spouse at no extra charge 50% off on published room tariff for suites on weekends (nights of Friday/Saturday) PRIVILEGES ON HAUTE COUTURE Earn Green Points @ 5% on all eligible spends at participating Wills Lifestyle stores Enjoy exclusive benefits like priority on garment availability, doorstep delivery of apparel and complimentary monogramming service This membership will be valid for a period of 12 months.
